MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commisioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. Garen McCall represented Plaintiff Ellis Ross Anderson. Defendant appeared in pro per. The Case did not settle. Matter taken off the settlement conference calendar. Trial date is confirmed.
